# #1363 - regression intersection is invalid in boost > 1.78 [Open]

> Username: jmachowinski  
> Created at: 2025-01-09 16:31:23 UTC  
> Updated at: 2025-01-09 18:00:21 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/geometry/issues/1363  

Two touching polygons reproduce a invalid intersection in newer boost versions.  
  
Input:   
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/51e82012-5dca-4eb6-a6dc-84ab047bfb61)  
  
Output of intersection:  
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/61c585d6-4053-4224-b80e-e735bdda0009)  
  
  
Reproducer  
https://godbolt.org/z/avPajMPfh
